news.t: The 3 Best High-Yielding Short-Term Bond ETFs (HYS, SJNK)

overview.description: The PIMCO 0-5 Year High Yield Corporate Bond Index Exchange-Traded Fund (HYS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund aims to capture exposure to the short maturity segment of the high-yield corporate bond sector. HYS was launched on Jun 16, 2011 and is issued by PIMCO.
